query:
UPDATE orders 
SET deliveryDuration = CASE
  WHEN acceptedAt IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, acceptedAt, deliveredAt)
  ELSE TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, createdAt, deliveredAt)
END
WHERE status = 'delivered' 
  AND deliveryDuration IS NULL 
  AND deliveredAt IS NOT NULL;
